name: Your Debt Under Construction, LLC
description_short: Las Vegas-based debt relief firm offering settlement, consolidation, and bankruptcy assistance to help clients manage student loans, credit cards, and medical debt.
description_long:
Your Debt Under Construction, LLC is a debt relief company headquartered in Las Vegas, Nevada, operating from 4558 E Tropicana Ave. The company positions itself as a resource for consumers facing overwhelming debt from multiple sources, particularly student loans, medical bills, and credit card balances.

The firm offers a range of debt management and relief services, including debt consolidation to simplify multiple payments into more manageable monthly obligations, creditor negotiation to reduce balances or improve terms, and bankruptcy filing assistance across multiple chapters. They also provide ancillary services like notary services and credit repair support. Their stated goal is to help clients regain financial freedom by getting creditors to back off and restructuring debt loads.

The company emphasizes certified debt relief expertise and offers free initial consultations. Operating Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 5 PM, they're accessible by phone at (702) 708-6961, email at y.du.c.llc@gmail.com, or through their website at yducllc.com. Their service keywords span debt settlement, lien stripping, Chapter 7, Chapter 11, and Chapter 13 bankruptcy options.

As of the data provided, the company has no posted customer reviews on the listing directory, limiting third-party verification of service quality or outcomes. Prospective clients should request the free consultation to understand specific fee structures, success rates, and whether their situation qualifies for the various services offered. Like most debt relief services, results depend heavily on creditor cooperation and individual financial circumstances.

When evaluating debt relief companies, consumers should compare settlement programs against alternatives like debt consolidation loans, which combine multiple debts into a single fixed-rate payment. Credit counseling through nonprofit agencies offers free budgeting help without impacting credit scores. For those whose credit has already been damaged, credit repair services can address inaccurate negative items on reports. Personal loans for bad credit may provide funds for debt payoff at lower rates than credit cards, and credit monitoring services help track progress throughout the recovery process. Consolidating high-interest balances into a single installment loan with a fixed rate can reduce total interest paid and simplify monthly budgeting.
address: 4558 E Tropicana Ave, Las Vegas, NV 89121

company_info.headquarters: 4558 E Tropicana Ave, Las Vegas, NV 89121

pros: Offers free initial consultation to assess debt situation before committing
Provides multiple debt relief options (settlement, consolidation, bankruptcy) rather than single-solution approach
Services span both out-of-court solutions (settlement, consolidation) and formal bankruptcy filing across Chapter 7, 11, and 13
Includes ancillary services like notary and lien stripping beyond basic debt consolidation
Local Las Vegas operation with established physical office location
Accessible via multiple channels: phone, email, website, and in-person consultation
Marketed as staffed by certified debt relief experts
cons: No customer reviews posted on any directory—no third-party verification of service quality or results
Website does not disclose fee structure, pricing model, or whether they charge upfront or contingency-based fees
No information provided on success rates, average debt reduction, or typical client outcomes
Limited online presence—main listing is directory entry; company website URL not independently verified for content depth
Debt settlement and consolidation services carry inherent risks (credit score impact, tax consequences, creditor non-cooperation) not explicitly addressed in available materials
best_for: Las Vegas residents with multiple high-interest debts (credit cards, medical bills) seeking consolidation or settlement
Individuals considering bankruptcy who want professional guidance on Chapter 7 vs. Chapter 13 options before filing
Consumers overwhelmed by student loan, credit card, and medical debt seeking creditor negotiation support
diagnosis: Your Debt Under Construction is best for Las Vegas-area residents with multiple debts who want professional guidance through consolidation, settlement, or bankruptcy options. Key caveat: the complete lack of customer reviews and absence of published fee structures mean prospective clients cannot independently verify service quality or cost before committing; requesting the free consultation and comparing it against other local providers is essential due diligence.
